messages.content:
Explain the CVE description using professional cybersecurity language.

Go before 1.16.12 and 1.17.x before 1.17.5 on UNIX allows write operations to an unintended file or unintended network connection as a consequence of erroneous closing of file descriptor 0 after file-descriptor exhaustion.

Versions of Go prior to 1.16.12 and 1.17.x prior to 1.17.5 on UNIX systems have a vulnerability that can result in unintended write operations. This occurs due to the incorrect closing of file descriptor 0 following file-descriptor exhaustion, potentially leading to data being written to an unintended file or network connection.
